7399e97e5331~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779304525\u0026x-signature=55jhTOIQsYdIYGg%2FP7qn5mjMxOg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"345"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11681,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18412,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5347},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581889206439117630","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一篇很优美的文，可是我只看了第一个世界，有点看不下去了！不是写的不好，而是写的太好，看到了红墙绿瓦四方天空里的女子们那深深的无力和悲戚，还有主角一个平凡的现代人有着并不强大的金手指也无能保住自己的孩子看着他们一个个的疏远尊敬自己离自己而去。看到一个被封建礼教束缚住不得展翅的现代灵魂清醒的让自己尽量不去在意的自欺欺人自己很好很充实很满足！\n这样清醒的痛苦，真的是原主想要的逆袭吗？还不如痛快的轰轰烈烈的死去来的痛快！\n我不懂！！！！难过//！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765300397,"group_id":"7218172213071973434","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"🥀别在我的坟前哭，省的脏了我轮回的路！💕","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N37DfmUMtrzGsDakxVwAQcow57HXO+KYcF2Rdr/rRuuO","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/23642cd76b464b22a1346704fae4b46f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776700803\u0026x-signature=7m0jYNoowvn6rwJbsK4iQg8cn6s%3D","user_id":"1213491498977895","user_name":"吖喵ᴸᵒᵛᵉᵧₒᵤ🐾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1213491498977895","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1655463218,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.bytei
